_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Tripura Sundari Temple
temples.description: A major Shakti Peeth at Udaipur, also known as Matabari.

temples.name: Kasba Kali Temple
temples.description: A hilltop Kali temple at Kamalasagar, built by Maharaja Dhanya Manikya in the late 15th century.

temples.name: Chaturdasha Devata Temple
temples.description: A historic temple at Khayerpur dedicated to the fourteen deities of Tripura.

temples.name: Bhuvaneswari Temple
temples.description: A historic temple at Udaipur associated with Tripura's Manikya period heritage.

temples.name: Jagannath Temple, Agartala
temples.description: A Jagannath temple in Agartala, part of the city's historic palace-area religious landscape.
